mnemonics.title: Wait and Signal Operations
mnemonics.content: P and V: Think 'P' for 'Please may I have it?' (wait) and 'V' for 'Voila! Here it is.' (signal). Alternatively, 'Wait' decreases the value, 'Signal' increases it.

mnemonics.title: Semaphore Value Meaning
mnemonics.content: Positive = Available units; Zero = No units, next waiter won't block; Negative = Number of processes sleeping.

mnemonics.title: Producer-Consumer Semaphores
mnemonics.content: Producer: Wait for Empty, Wait for Mutex, Signal Mutex, Signal Full. Consumer: Wait for Full, Wait for Mutex, Signal Mutex, Signal Empty. Remember the order: Resource (Empty/Full) before Lock (Mutex).
